characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
captureSummaryEn: observational camera relation, close distance, half body coverage, readable face, balanced environment weight
captureGuidanceEn: the frame should feel witnessed from the outside, not automatically self-held
a brief or partial face glimpse is enough; do not force portrait dominance
partial body coverage is enough when it keeps the moment concrete
medium distance is a stable everyday framing for ordinary daily-life moments
balance the protagonist and environment so they support the same lived beat together
the face should be readable, but the lived event may still stay primary
half-body coverage is allowed when it helps the action read cleanly
close framing is allowed when it helps the lived beat read more clearly
framingZh: 让构图跟随同一个生活节拍，使动作和空间保持连贯。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 她拿着杯子的手部特写，可以看清手指与杯沿的接触点
她的侧脸或上半身，表情是专注而略带疑惑的停顿
背景是家中桌面的局部，光线偏冷，符合傍晚氛围
mustShowEn: her hand holding the cup, with a clear view of the fingertip touching the small chip on the rim
her profile or upper body, with an expression of focused, slightly puzzled pause
partial view of a home desk surface in the background, with cool-toned evening light
mayShowZh: 桌上的其他日常物品，如笔记本或笔
她头发上的红色小发夹（如果自然可见）
mayShowEn: other ordinary items on the desk, like a notebook or pen
the small red hairclip in her hair (if naturally visible)
mustAvoidZh: 将这一刻重写为不同的事件
让背景人物或无关路人占据比主角更多的视觉权重
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into a different event
letting irrelevant bystanders or background people take more visual weight than the protagonist
atmosphereZh: 一个真实的生活片段，在流逝中被捕捉。
altTextZh: 角色月见璃音在傍晚家中，手指意外触碰到水杯边缘细小缺口时的瞬间。
